styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents

cases.prompt_body: Space Shuttle Challenger rising from the pad in cold morning light, white external tank and black orbiter tiles clearly readable, a small dark smoke puff escaping the right booster field joint during an otherwise routine ascent, pale sky, restrained flame, documentary tension

Hospital radiation treatment room with a Therac-25 and treatment table under clinical fluorescent light, the machine appears orderly while a lethal beam-mode mismatch is quietly present, pale beige panels, off-white housing, charcoal shadow, one concentrated warning glow where the beam path should be safe

Kansas City hotel atrium interior with suspended second- and fourth-floor walkways crossing open space, warm lobby light and bronze railings, one fourth-floor hanger-rod connection quietly carrying both walkway loads in contradiction to the elegant room, no crowd, pre-collapse stillness

Boeing 737 MAX 8 in climb just after takeoff, enlarged engines mounted forward and high, silver fuselage against a muted sky, one subtle nose-down trim contradiction pulling against an otherwise normal ascent, restrained aviation documentary tension
